descriptions.english: The front non-boss enemy in each wave gets [undying] [effect0.status0.power].
descriptions.french: Le premier ennemi (hors boss) de chaque vague reçoit [undying] [effect0.status0.power].
descriptions.german: Der vorderste Gegner pro Welle (kein Boss) erhält [undying] [effect0.status0.power].
descriptions.russian: Каждую волну передний боец (не-босс) получает [undying] x[effect0.status0.power].
descriptions.portuguese: Em cada onda, o primeiro inimigo que não for um chefão recebe [undying] [effect0.status0.power].
descriptions.chinese: 每个波次中，前排非首领敌方单位获得 [undying] [effect0.status0.power]。
descriptions.spanish: La primera unidad enemiga no jefe añade en cada oleada [undying] [effect0.status0.power].
descriptions.chinese_traditional: 每個波次的前排非首領敵人獲得[undying][effect0.status0.power]。
descriptions.korean: 웨이브마다 보스 외 전열 적 유닛이 [undying] [effect0.status0.power] 효과를 획득합니다.
descriptions.japanese: 毎ウェーブ、前列の非ボスの敵が[undying] [effect0.status0.power]を得る。
